side.title: Prefer to buy in person?
side.body: Violet is carried by authorised retailers across Europe, Russia, and the Middle East. Tell us your country in the form and we'll point you to your nearest dealer.

hero.body: Every element below — the monogram, the champagne palette, the engraved type and the guilloché — is drawn directly from the Collection 2026 master.

mark.title: A monogram, a wordmark, one lockup
mark.sub: The calligraphic V is the signature; the engraved VIOLET wordmark gives it voice. Use the full medallion lockup for primary placements, the horizontal lockup for headers, and the bare monogram as an app or favicon mark.

palette.title: Aubergine leads, champagne signs
palette.sub: Primary is the deep aubergine of the master field; secondary is the champagne gold reserved for signatures, rules and rare premium actions. Neutrals are tinted toward the aubergine so the whole system feels of one ink.

type.title: Engraved, calligraphic, composed
type.sub: Two faces carry the identity; two carry the interface. Cinzel engraves the wordmark, Pinyon Script signs the monogram, Cormorant Garamond sets heritage headlines, and Inter runs the UI.

texture.title: The floral lattice
texture.body: A six-petal damask drawn from the Collection 2026 master — seamless, recolorable line-work with the script V worked between the blooms. It belongs to dark hero fields, packaging, endpapers and certificates — never behind body copy.

application.title: One brand, two registers
application.sub: The dark aubergine register carries heroes and signatures; the light register carries the catalogue and the interface. Gold appears sparingly across both.

Product.description: A refined {line} timepiece — stainless steel, sapphire-clear mineral glass, and a balanced {mm} mm case on a {strap} strap. Designed in the Violet tradition of quiet, lasting elegance.

NewModels.subtitle: The season's latest timepieces — fresh designs, refined movements. Filter by what matters to you and find the one that's yours.

hero.title: Timekeeping, refined
hero.subtitle: For those who value time — a brand built on precision, restraint, and a quiet kind of confidence that lasts.

story.title: A name built on time
story.body1: Violet began with a simple belief: that a watch should be honest. Honest in its engineering, honest in its design, and honest about the person who wears it.
story.body2: Today, over a thousand models carry that idea across borders and languages — each one uniting precision movements with considered, restrained design. Nothing decorative. Nothing wasted.

items.title: Founded
items.body: Violet is established with a single principle — restraint as luxury.

items.title: The Classic line
items.body: The first dress collection sets the house signature: balanced cases, clean dials.

items.title: Going international
items.body: The brand reaches new markets across three languages and two continents.

items.title: Sport & Smart
items.body: Diver and connected lines extend the family without diluting the identity.

items.title: 2026 · Today
items.body: Over 1000 models, 4000+ photography frames, and one unwavering design language.

quality.title: Made to last a lifetime
quality.subtitle: Every Violet is the sum of small, exacting decisions — materials chosen for their integrity, finishes earned by hand.

items.title: Sapphire-grade glass
items.body: Hardened mineral crystal that resists the scratches of everyday life.

items.title: 316L steel cases
items.body: Surgical-grade stainless steel, finished by hand to a flawless surface.

items.title: Water resistance
items.body: From 3 to 20 ATM — tested and rated for life, sport, and the deep.

items.title: Movement accuracy
items.body: Quartz and automatic calibres, each regulated for lasting precision.

values.title: Timeless
values.body: We design for decades, not seasons. A Violet should feel as right in twenty years as it does today.

values.title: Refined
values.body: Restraint is our luxury. We remove until only the essential — and the beautiful — remains.

values.title: Authentic
values.body: Honest materials, honest engineering, honest prices. No theatre, no shortcuts.

hero.title: The engineering
hero.subtitle: Precision you can feel, materials you can trust, and details designed to endure — long after the trend has passed.

movements.title: Precision at the core
movements.body: Every Violet runs on a calibre chosen for its character — the effortless accuracy of quartz, or the living heartbeat of an automatic.
points: Swiss-style quartz, accurate to seconds per month
Self-winding automatic movements with a visible rotor
Each calibre individually regulated before it ships

materials.title: Built from the right things
materials.body: We start with materials that earn their place — surgical-grade steel, sapphire-hard glass, and straps finished by hand.
points: Sapphire-grade mineral crystal resists everyday scratches
Genuine leather, woven mesh, steel and rubber strap options

items.title: Long-life battery
items.body: Up to 3 years on a single cell in quartz calibres.

items.title: Luminous dials
items.body: Super-LumiNova indices that glow through the night.

items.title: Smart connectivity
items.body: Hybrid models pair to your phone for notifications & tracking.

items.title: Balanced cases
items.body: 36–45 mm diameters, sized for every wrist.

items.title: Interchangeable straps
items.body: Quick-release pins — swap leather, steel, mesh or rubber in seconds.

cta.title: Find the technology that fits you
cta.subtitle: Explore the collection and filter by movement, water resistance, and more.

hero.title: Questions, answered
hero.subtitle: Everything you might want to know about ordering, owning, and caring for a Violet timepiece.

items.a: In-stock pieces ship within 1–2 business days. Standard delivery arrives in 3–5 business days; express is available at checkout for next-day arrival in most regions. International orders typically clear customs within 7–10 business days.

Yes. Violet ships to over 60 countries across three of our supported languages — English, Russian, and Arabic. Duties and import taxes are calculated transparently at checkout, so there are no surprises on arrival.
Every shipment includes a tracking link sent by email the moment your piece leaves our atelier. You can also view live status from your account under Orders.
All orders are fully insured in transit and require a signature on delivery. If anything arrives damaged, contact us within 48 hours and we will arrange a replacement.

items.q: What warranty comes with a Violet watch?
items.a: Each timepiece carries a 2-year international warranty covering movement and manufacturing defects. The warranty card is included with your watch and is honoured at every authorised Violet service centre.

items.q: Are the movements quartz or automatic?
items.a: Both. Our Classic and Smart lines use precision quartz calibres, while the Heritage and Sport lines feature self-winding automatic movements. The movement type is listed on every product page.

items.q: How water resistant are Violet watches?
items.a: Ratings range from 3 ATM for dress models to 20 ATM for our diver line. Each piece is individually tested and rated for life, sport, or the deep — check the specifications tab for the exact rating.
Movements are engineered to Japanese precision standards and cases are finished by hand in our atelier. Every watch passes a multi-point inspection before it ships.

items.q: How do I care for my watch?
items.a: Wipe the case and bracelet with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid contact with perfumes and solvents, and keep the watch away from strong magnetic fields. For water-resistant models, rinse with fresh water after exposure to salt water.

items.q: How often should it be serviced?
items.a: Automatic movements benefit from a service every 3–5 years; quartz models every 4–6 years, typically alongside a battery change. Authorised servicing preserves both accuracy and warranty cover.

items.q: Can I change the strap myself?
items.a: Many Violet straps use quick-release spring bars and can be swapped without tools. For integrated bracelets we recommend a visit to an authorised dealer to avoid scratching the lugs.
Unworn pieces in original condition can be returned within 30 days for a full refund. Simply request a return from your account and we will email a prepaid, insured shipping label.

items.q: How do I find an authorised dealer?
items.a: Use the dealer locator on our Contact page, or reach our concierge directly — we will point you to the nearest authorised Violet boutique or service centre.

items.q: I need help with an existing order.
items.a: Our support team responds within one business day. Reach us through the Contact page with your order number and we will take it from there.

cta.title: Our concierge is here for you
cta.body: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach our team directly — we usually reply within one business day.
